hero.description: Detect diseases early, get treatment recommendations, and maximize your yield with our smart crop disease detection system. Built for modern farmers.

features.title: Instant Disease Detection
features.description: Upload a photo of your crop leaf and get instant results with high accuracy using our advanced AI models trained on thousands of crop diseases.

treatment.title: Treatment Recommendations
treatment.description: Get actionable advice and treatment steps for detected diseases to save your crops immediately. Our recommendations are based on agricultural best practices.

history.title: Detection History & Analytics
history.description: Keep track of all your past scans and monitor the health trends of your farm over time with detailed charts and insights.

schemes.title: Government Schemes
schemes.description: Access the latest government schemes and subsidies available for farmers in your region. Stay updated with new programs and benefits.

upload.title: Easy Image Upload
upload.description: Simple and intuitive interface to capture or upload crop images. Works seamlessly on mobile devices for on-field detection.

about.description1: At PlantGuard, we're committed to revolutionizing agriculture through technology. Our mission is to provide farmers with accessible, accurate, and actionable insights to protect their crops from diseases.
about.description2: By leveraging advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning, we help farmers detect crop diseases early, receive treatment recommendations, and make informed decisions that lead to healthier crops and better yields.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

farmerCentric.title: Farmer-Centric
farmerCentric.description: We put farmers first in everything we design and build.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: We strive for the highest accuracy in disease detection.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously innovate to serve farmers better.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We make advanced technology accessible to all farmers.

cta.title: Ready to protect your crops?
cta.description: Join thousands of farmers who are already using PlantGuard to detect diseases early and maximize their yields.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your farm's status.

dashboard.noGeolocation: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
dashboard.analyzeFirst: Start by analyzing your first crop image.
